item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
nothin wrong with that
i'm in
i don't drink anymore but that image kinda takes me back
should branch out a bit
agree
mmm hmm
this is probably gonna get crazy if it's like last year
is that one? no..
yes
as is tradition
gross
is that really what mana is?
you see it all the time
that escalated quickly
i like oasis but i dont really have the desire to see them live in 2024
seems easy enough..
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Nico Robin - One Piece Cosplay
item.description:
Love this cosplay! My dream is to hopefully wear it on the beach in Kauai next year, but we shall see if that happens :D Happy Thursday, little late today but got a cosplay up! Hope you enjoy and are having a good week everybody!
Reference image!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Much, much smarter than Orange Nixon.
item.dc:creator: BluesFish

item.title: Releasing stolen chaos back to the wild vol.13
item.description:
Hello again
Been a Rollercoaster of a summer
New brain drugs make it hard to get good sleep
Hopefully next month will be better.
Easier said than done sometimes
Never expected to make it this far
I'm not sure what time is anymore
I miss my weird people. They allowed me to be me
Why not?
Safety 3rd
Bob is always good for the soul
2 tiny yard friends
Fluffy idiot tax. Thank you for participating. Until next time. Be excellent to each other and to yourself. FP edit: thanks for the updoots you glorious weirdos :) Grab life by the pan handle and just keep swinging. Send love to someone who needs it ❤️
item.dc:creator: fthne

item.title: I have a concept of a plan
item.dc:creator: TRLthebean70

item.title: A little bit of everything (my first dump!)
item.dc:creator: HappyMirror

item.title: Born on September 12th - now with one removed because I didn't realise what a scumback he was - sorry
item.description:
1. Sydney Sweeney - 1997. American actress
2. Emmy Rossum - 1986. American singer and actress
3. Alfie Allen - 1986. English actor (just don't mention sausages to him)
4. Paul Walker - 1973. American actor, died 30th November 2013.
5. Larry LaLonde - 1968. American guitarist and songwriter. Primus sucks!
7. Amy Yasbeck - 1962. American actress
8. Rachel Ward - 1957. English-Australian actress
9. Hans Zimmerman - 1957. German composer, filmscorer and producer
10. Neil Peart - 1952. Canadian musician, drummer for Rush. Died 7th January 2020
11. Joe Pantoliano - 1951. American actor
12. Barry White - 1944. American singer-songwriter. Died 4th July 2003
13. Ian Holme - 1931. English actor. Died 19th June 2020
14. Desmond Llewelyn - 1914. Welsh actor, best known for playing Q in the James Bond movies. Died 19th December 1999
15. Jesse Owens - 1913. American track and field athlete, famously won 4 gold medals at the 1936 Olympics in Berlin. Died 31st March 1980
item.dc:creator: Nuraalek

item.title: Wholesome. Two Chinese kids meet a black man for the first time.
item.description: Came across this and just thought it was adorable. These kids were just full of questions and it led to a very wholesome interaction. Very interesting place that he’s at though. Fancy hotel?

item.title: This glass Aural Abalone Shell looks perfect at the beach
item.dc:creator: Sonflooki

item.title: My first ever apartment
item.description:
Day one. Oh how lovely it looks now without all my junk in it
Day 7. Took me a week but I did it. Took a trip every day after work, unloading a car full at a time, then hit the storage unit all in one swoop on sunday. Never realized I had this much stuff!
item.dc:creator: grandefalco

item.title: Images of Note: Bloodcheep
item.description:
I live near the Airport, I know how planes work logically but internally I'm like "There's just people in that thing that just fucking flying".
Oh and here comes the 9/11 memes
Like a shit ancient greek bard making up a story on the spot, Trump makes up bullshit.
Elon Musk is the most divorced man alive.
I wish I could say "this is just Southern England/London" but then I remember that I'm Scottish and we call Tap Water "Cooncil Juice" (Council Juice) because the local council used to be in charge of the Water Supply.
SQUIDWARD NO
Plot Twist, John Wayne Gacy can't actually die, he actually can't die. He survived the execution, and because he did, he "did his sentence", secretly got released, and changed his name to JD Vance.
DO YOU HEAR THE PEOPLE SING?
"Accidentally"
Oh no.
Oh no.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: And ten minutes later your butthole still needs a cigarette?

item.title: Wow! What an amazing woman!
item.description: Unfortunately she passed away in 2018, however I never heard of her work until now, so sharing in case others also didn't know. Absolute wonderful work https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Daphne_Sheldrick Edit: came across a really cute funny video of a very cheeky elephant with one of their minders from this foundation, heres the link if anyone wants to see it https://imgur.com/gallery/kwH7xa1 (originally posted by @DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2 on 2023-09-13 21:22:50)

item.title: Epic Teamup (collab comic) [OC]
item.description:
Collab comic with Godzilla Artist Matt Frank! I'm so psyched to have original Litterbox Kitty-zilla and Cat-dam designs! I don't think I've ever seen a Kaiju with whiskers before and I love it! I also had the honor of coloring Matt's linework, which was a really fun challenge!
As we’re at the halfway point in the Animated Pilot Kickstarter campaign, I wanted to take a moment to thank you all for your amazing support so far! It’s funny to think that this comic started because I knew one person couldn’t make an animated show -and now here I am, 6 years later, with an army of people making it happen! You guys are THE BEST! So what’s next? Well we still have 2 weeks to raise as much as we can. Animation is very expensive and our goal was the absolute minimum we could make the pilot for, so the more we raise the better we can make it! To help make that happen, we lined up a bunch of exclusive rewards which will only be available by backing. If you haven’t already, I encourage you to check out the campaign page to see what’s on offer! https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/litterboxanimation/pilot-episode?ref=f52qpp Onwards and upwards! Thank you!!
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics
